description: Hardcoded default retention duration (15d) could lead to unexpected data retention behavior if not properly configured
suggested_fix: Make default retention duration configurable via environment variable or config file

description: Error handling in reloadConfig function doesn't properly distinguish between different types of configuration errors
suggested_fix: Add specific error types for different configuration failure modes

description: Unbounded channel operations in signal handling could lead to memory leaks under high load
suggested_fix: Add capacity limits to channels and proper cleanup in defer statements

description: Inconsistent error handling between Discoverer implementations - some close channels while others don't
suggested_fix: Standardize channel handling across all Discoverer implementations

description: Potential XSS vulnerability in scrape response handling where user-controlled data is directly used in HTTP responses
suggested_fix: Implement proper content escaping for all user-controlled data in responses

description: Memory allocation hotspot in scrapeLoop.append method with repeated buffer allocations
suggested_fix: Implement buffer pooling for scrape operations

description: Swallowed errors in exemplar processing could mask important failure modes
suggested_fix: Add proper error propagation for exemplar processing failures

description: God object pattern in flagConfig struct with too many responsibilities
suggested_fix: Split into smaller, focused configuration structs

description: Inconsistent naming conventions between scrapeLoop and scrapePool methods
suggested_fix: Standardize naming conventions across related components

description: Potential path traversal vulnerability in file path handling for configuration files
suggested_fix: Add proper path validation and sanitization

description: Inefficient string operations in metadata handling could impact performance
suggested_fix: Use string builders and minimize allocations

description: Missing validation for critical configuration parameters that could lead to runtime failures
suggested_fix: Add comprehensive validation for all configuration parameters

description: Dead code in discovery manager implementation that's never called
suggested_fix: Remove unused code paths and methods

description: Inconsistent error handling between AppenderV1 and AppenderV2 implementations
suggested_fix: Standardize error handling across appender versions

description: Insecure deserialization of configuration files without proper validation
suggested_fix: Add schema validation for configuration files
